heroes.bioLeft: Full stack developer reading every line like a length ball — judging early, committing late.
heroes.bioRight: Open to collaboration. Let's build something worth a standing ovation.

abouts.heading: Read the spin.
abouts.para1: I'm Rithik Sharon A — a full stack developer who approaches code the way a batsman reads spin: with patience, precision, and intent.
abouts.para2: Based in Chennai, I build end-to-end digital products — from pixel-perfect React frontends to robust Node.js APIs, always thinking about the full pitch.
abouts.para3: When I'm not shipping code, I'm following cricket, obsessing over clean architecture, and looking for the next boundary to hit.

projects.title: MERN Movie Management Dashboard
projects.description: Engineered a full-stack MERN application implementing multi-layer authentication using Express.js middleware and JWT authorization. Developed high-performance RESTful APIs reducing database query response time by 25%. Optimized MongoDB Atlas through strategic schema design, pagination and indexing. Integrated Redux Toolkit reducing component re-renders by 20%. Leveraged AWS to host production-grade data maintaining seamless sync for 500+ concurrent entries.
projects.techStack: React.js, Redux, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB Atlas, JWT, REST APIs, AWS

projects.title: Agentic AI Digital Twin
projects.description: Developed a full-stack MERN application using MVC architecture and Express.js to automate data retrieval via secure RESTful APIs. Strengthened backend with modular Node.js logic and MongoDB Atlas ensuring 99.9% uptime. Implemented secure JWT authentication and middleware validation. Orchestrated OpenRouter API for autonomous reasoning resulting in 30% reduction in context-switching. Constructed a RAG-based system enhancing knowledge retrieval precision by 40% over base models.
projects.techStack: JavaScript, OpenRouter, Agentic AI, React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB Atlas, JWT, Vite

services.name: Full Stack Development
services.description: End-to-end MERN stack web applications — from pixel-perfect React frontends to robust Node.js APIs, built for scale and performance.

services.name: Backend Architecture
services.description: RESTful API design with Node.js and Express.js, JWT authentication, MVC pattern, middleware, and MongoDB Atlas database optimization.

services.name: AI Integration
services.description: RAG-based systems, OpenRouter API orchestration, agentic AI workflows, and intelligent chatbot development.

services.name: Cloud Deployment
services.description: Production-grade deployment on AWS and Vercel with CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions, and performance optimization.

services.name: Frontend Engineering
services.description: React.js with Redux Toolkit, Vite, Tailwind CSS — responsive, animated, pixel-perfect interfaces with clean component architecture.

site-settings.seoTitle: Rithik Sharon A — Full Stack Developer
site-settings.seoDesc: Full Stack Developer from Chennai specializing in MERN stack, RESTful APIs, JWT authentication, and AI integration. National Hackathon Finalist.
